## KEY FRAMEWORKS EXTRAÍDOS

2. **One-Liner Formula** — Problem + Product + Result
3. **Landing Page Wireframe** — 8 sections sequenciais
4. **Sales Funnel Architecture** — 5 peças de collateral
5. **Grunt Test** — 3 perguntas em 5 segundos
6. **Guide Positioning** — Empathy + Authority
7. **Email Campaign Types** — 5 tipos de email
